info.title: How to convert images with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, choose the output format, adjust the quality and download the result. The process runs in your browser.
info.stepOneText: Select a JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG image from your device.
info.stepTwoText: Choose the format and adjust quality when available.
info.stepThreeText: Convert and save the new image immediately.
